pr.title: feat(ui): extend editorial redesign to brands and edit pages
pr.body:
## Summary

Extends the editorial "almanac" UI to the remaining client pages that still used the old shadcn card layout.

- **Brands (`/brands`)**: editorial masthead, hairline brand grid with progress stats
- **Brand detail (`/brands/[brand]`)**: masthead with completion panel, underline sport tabs, updated set cards
- **Edit set (`/set/[id]/edit`)**: editorial header, underline form fields, hairline card list, matching save/result panels

## Test plan

- [ ] Visit `/brands` — grid renders with progress bars and navigates to brand detail
- [ ] Visit `/brands/[brand]` — sport tabs, set cards, back link work
- [ ] Visit `/set/[id]/edit` — edit form saves, delete card dialog works, result panel shows on save

Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
pr.author: birdwell
